title: Wild Wolves
body:
Wilder Wolves!

Remodeled Wolves with new features like random eye colors and floppy ears!

Features:

  • Normal and folded ears
  • New textures for all the nine varieties.
  • New animations for sitting and attacking.
  • Randomized eye shapes and colors.

Pre 1.20.5 Coats:

  • Black
  • Gray
  • Dark Gray
  • Darkbrown/Timber
  • Brown/Tan
  • White

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Wild Wolves should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
